backend/DirectionType.mo: Defines a DirectionType variant with #up and #down options for market direction.
backend/main.mo: Main actor implementing market data caching, user profile/preferences management, HTTP outcalls for Binance/CoinGecko APIs, radar alerts, and role-based access control with admin/user permissions.
backend/MarketData.mo: Defines MarketData type containing symbol, price, volume, and direction fields.
backend/Theme.mo: Defines Theme variant with #darkNeon and #cyberGlow options.
backend/UserPreferences.mo: Defines UserPreferences and UserPreferencesInput types with favorites, theme, alerts, and language settings.
feature_evidence.json: Documents implemented features for trade monitoring including input form, real-time PnL panel, take-profit zones, stop-loss recommendations, and technical analysis integration.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Contains summaries of all frontend components including 10-tab navigation, PWA features, market overview, radar dashboard, predictive confidence panels, and mobile-optimized layouts.
frontend/index.css: Empty CSS file (content truncated or not present).
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with comprehensive PWA meta tags, iOS splash screens, multiple icon sizes, and standalone display configuration for mobile app experience.
frontend/public/manifest.json: PWA manifest defining app metadata, standalone display mode, icons (192x192, 512x512, 1024x1024, maskable), screenshots, and shortcuts to key features like Market, Radar, Recommendations, and Opportunities.
frontend/public/sw.js: Service worker (v9) that caches static assets (icons, manifest, HTML) for offline PWA functionality and implements cache-first strategy with runtime fallbacks for API calls and dynamic content.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main application component that manages tab navigation, lazy-loads heavy components, initializes the learning engine, registers the service worker, and handles online/offline states with update notifications.
frontend/src/components/AIPerformancePan: Displays AI learning statistics for crypto assets including learning level, accuracy rate, and prediction counts with visual progress bars and badges; supports both compact and full views.
frontend/src/components/AppErrorBoundary: React error boundary that catches uncaught errors, displays user-friendly error messages with special handling for PWA cache mismatches, and provides a reload button that clears service worker caches.
frontend/src/components/AssetResearch.ts: Asset search and research component that fetches all Binance Futures USDT symbols, provides autocomplete search functionality, and displays detailed asset information with predictive confidence panels.
frontend/src/components/DataStatusIndica: Fixed-position status indicator that displays data freshness, fetching state, and error messages (including blocked/restricted access) with last update timestamps and retry functionality.
frontend/src/components/DynamicAlerts.ts: Displays dynamic toast-style alerts for radar anomalies and high-confidence recommendations, with sensitivity-aware cooldowns and auto-dismiss after 8 seconds.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Simple footer component displaying copyright notice and a link to caffeine.ai with a heart icon.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: App header with branding, logo, and conditional PWA install button that opens an install dialog.
frontend/src/components/ICPAnalysis.tsx: Detailed analysis card for ICP (Internet Computer) token showing price, change percentage, manipulation zones, institutional orders, and predictive confidence panel with neon styling.
frontend/src/components/InstallPrompt.ts: Proactive PWA install prompt that appears after 3 seconds if app is installable, with dismiss functionality and dialog trigger.
frontend/src/components/InstitutionalOrd: Tab page displaying BTC institutional buy/sell signals for both Futures (USD-M) and Spot markets with error categorization, refresh functionality, and formatted price/timestamp display.
frontend/src/components/MarketCard.tsx: Clickable market card component showing symbol, price, 24h change, volume, strength, and confidence with neon-styled borders and hover effects based on bullish/bearish state.
frontend/src/components/MarketOverview.t: Displays live Binance Futures market data in a grid of MarketCard components with predictive confidence, AI performance panels, and detailed analysis for a selected symbol including manipulation zones and institutional orders.
frontend/src/components/MonitoredTradeCa: Renders a card for a monitored trade showing symbol, direction, leverage, entry price, PnL percentage, elapsed time, and a remove button with visual styling based on profitability.
frontend/src/components/Opportunities.ts: Displays trading opportunities organized by modality (scalping, swing, breakout, reversal, SMC, FVG) in tabs, with a list of opportunities per modality and a details panel for selected symbols.
frontend/src/components/OpportunityDetai: Side panel showing detailed trade setup for a selected symbol and modality, including current price, trade recommendation with entry/exit levels, and risk/reward analysis.
frontend/src/components/OrderBook.tsx: Displays order book depth data for both Binance Futures and Spot markets with configurable aggregation levels, refresh controls, error categorization, and formatted price/size tables.
frontend/src/components/PredictiveConfid: Displays AI prediction confidence level with animated gradient progress bar, color-coded badges (high/medium/low), and optional compact mode.
frontend/src/components/PWADiagnosticsVi: Diagnostic panel showing PWA installation status, display mode (standalone vs browser), install prompt availability, and technical details about the app's PWA capabilities.
frontend/src/components/PWAInstallDialog: Dialog component for PWA installation with platform-specific instructions (iOS Safari manual steps vs. Android/Chrome one-click install) and benefits list.
frontend/src/components/PWAInstallStatus: Status card displaying PWA installation state (installed/installable/unsupported), display mode, and platform-specific installation instructions with visual badges.
frontend/src/components/RadarDashboard.t: Main radar alerts dashboard with filtering by trend/confidence/anomaly types, sensitivity presets, real-time alert highlighting, and learning level integration from market data.
frontend/src/components/ResetFromScratch: Confirmation dialog for resetting all local app data (AI learning history, preferences, caches) with loading state and automatic app reload on success.
frontend/src/components/StopLossRecommen: Card displaying calculated stop-loss price recommendation with distance from entry, percentage loss, and risk-reward ratios for three take-profit levels.
frontend/src/components/TabFetchErrorSta: Error state component for tab data fetching failures, displaying error details with reload functionality and special handling for PWA cache mismatch issues.
frontend/src/components/TabPageCard.tsx: Reusable card wrapper component for tab pages with neon-styled borders, supporting icon, title, description, badge, and children content.
Displays calculated take-profit zones for a monitored trade with percentage gains, target prices, and visual indicators for reached zones based on current price and trade direction.
frontend/src/components/ThemeProvider.ts: React context provider for theme management supporting 'darkNeon' and 'cyberGlow' themes with localStorage persistence and dynamic CSS class application.
frontend/src/components/TopRecommendatio: Displays top 10 trading recommendations with market data, confidence scores, AI learning levels, and predictive analysis panels using Binance market data and recommendation queries.
frontend/src/components/TradeInputForm.t: Form component for adding trades to monitoring with symbol autocomplete from Binance market data, leverage slider, long/short direction toggle, and entry price input.
Main trade monitoring page component managing the list of monitored trades with add/remove functionality and detailed panel view for selected trades.
frontend/src/components/TradeMonitoringP: Detailed panel for a selected monitored trade showing current price, PnL, liquidation price, take-profit zones, and stop-loss recommendations with real-time updates.
React component for user preferences UI including theme selection (darkNeon/cyberGlow), favorite assets management, alert toggles, learning prioritization settings, and PWA/reset dialogs with local storage persistence.
frontend/src/hooks/queries/analysisEnric: Calculates advanced technical analysis for Binance tickers including trend/strength, support/resistance zones, manipulation zones, institutional orders, and integrates with learning engine for optimized confidence scoring.
Browser-based Binance API fetching module for Futures USD-M and Spot market data with error classification (network, blocked, rate-limit, server) for actionable user messaging.
frontend/src/hooks/queries/binanceFuture: Fetches Binance Futures metrics (funding rates and open interest) with safe partial-failure handling and session-based in-memory history tracking for detecting changes.
frontend/src/hooks/queries/institutional: Detects institutional trading signals from BTC Futures and Spot data using volume patterns and price action, with React Query hooks and backend fallback support.
frontend/src/hooks/queries/learningInteg: Integrates learning engine with market data by recording predictions and updating results, with optional prioritization for user-favorite assets (lower confidence thresholds, sorted processing).
Generates trading recommendations and radar alerts from market data by detecting anomalies (price moves, volume spikes, volatility, funding irregularities, open interest spikes) using adaptive baselines and sensitivity policies.
frontend/src/hooks/queries/opportunityRu: Implements deterministic scoring and filtering logic to identify scalping, swing, and breakout trading opportunities based on volume, volatility, price changes, momentum, and confidence metrics.
frontend/src/hooks/queries/orderBookDept: React Query hooks for fetching and parsing BTC order book depth from Binance Futures and Spot APIs with fallback handling, error classification, and depth metrics computation.
frontend/src/hooks/queries/unifiedSnapsh: Transforms backend UnifiedSnapshot data into frontend-compatible BinanceMarketData format with technical analysis enrichment and safe number conversion handling for bigint/number types.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook that creates and manages an authenticated or anonymous backend actor based on Internet Identity state, invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: React context provider and hook for Internet Identity authentication, managing login/logout state, identity persistence, and AuthClient lifecycle with configurable options.
frontend/src/hooks/useMonitoredTrade.ts: React Query hook that monitors a single trade by fetching live price updates every 5 seconds and calculating real-time PnL percentage and liquidation price based on leverage and direction.
frontend/src/hooks/useMonitoredTrades.ts: React Query hook for managing monitored trades with CRUD operations (add, remove, get all) using IndexedDB storage and automatic cache invalidation.
frontend/src/hooks/useOpportunities.ts: Hook that computes trading opportunities across six modalities (scalping, swing, breakout, reversal, SMC, FVG) by applying deterministic selection rules to live Binance market data.
frontend/src/hooks/usePWADiagnostics.ts: Diagnostic hook that checks PWA installation readiness by validating display mode, service worker status, manifest availability, and critical icon resources, returning issues and status flags.
frontend/src/hooks/usePWAInstall.ts: Hook managing PWA installation state and prompts, detecting iOS devices, handling beforeinstallprompt events, tracking dismissal state, and monitoring display mode changes for installed status.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Main data fetching hook that retrieves Binance Futures market data, enriches it with technical analysis (SMC, FVG, institutional orders), generates recommendations and radar alerts, and integrates with the learning engine for prediction tracking.
frontend/src/hooks/useRadarSensitivity.t: Hook for managing radar sensitivity presets (conservative, balanced, aggressive) with localStorage persistence and cross-tab synchronization via storage events.
frontend/src/hooks/useServiceWorkerUpdat: Hook that detects service worker updates, tracks waiting workers, and provides a function to skip waiting and reload the app when updates are available.
frontend/src/hooks/useTradeRecommendatio: Hook that computes trade recommendations for a selected symbol and modality by finding the asset in market data and applying recommendation logic, returning success/error results.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for dark/neon/cyber themes, defining color schemes, sidebar styles, and background gradients with smooth transitions.
frontend/src/lib/learningEngine.ts: IndexedDB-based continuous learning engine that stores prediction records, tracks accuracy per asset, and adaptively adjusts indicator weights based on prediction outcomes.
frontend/src/lib/orderBookDepth.ts: Utilities for parsing Binance order book depth data, aggregating levels into price buckets, detecting order walls, and computing metrics like spread and imbalance.
frontend/src/lib/radarFilters.ts: Manages radar filter persistence in localStorage for anomaly types, minimum scores, and confidence thresholds with load/save/reset functionality.
frontend/src/lib/radarSensitivity.ts: Defines three sensitivity presets (conservative/balanced/aggressive) for radar anomaly detection with configurable thresholds, corroboration rules, and notification cooldowns.
frontend/src/lib/resetFromScratch.ts: Orchestrates complete app data reset by clearing IndexedDB, localStorage, CacheStorage, and unregistering service workers with success flag tracking.
frontend/src/lib/stopLossCalculation.ts: Calculates stop-loss recommendations for long/short positions based on entry price, volatility, support/resistance zones, and computes risk-reward ratios for take-profit levels.
frontend/src/lib/takeProfitCalculation.t: Calculates three take-profit zones (TP1, TP2, TP3) for long/short positions with volatility-adjusted percentages based on ATR and entry price.
frontend/src/lib/tradeRecommendation.ts: Computes trade recommendations (entry, stop-loss, take-profit) for different trading modalities using frontend-fetched Binance market data and technical analysis without backend calls.
frontend/src/lib/tradeStorage.ts: Provides IndexedDB storage functions for persisting monitored trades with CRUD operations (add, remove, get, getAll).
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query, Internet Identity provider, and renders the root App component.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting, persisting, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage integration.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom color schemes (including neon colors), container settings, border radius variables, and shadow utilities for the UI.
project_state.json: Project metadata documenting architecture decisions, known issues (Binance API blocking, deployment errors), and existing features for trade monitoring and market analysis.
